untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration confirmation (Johansen test, p < 0.15) and error-correction model divergence measurement, which are not available in the standard indicator set. Cointegration testing and ECM calculations require multivariate time series analysis external to single-pair OHLCV indicators. Used Bollinger Band %B as a proxy for mean-reversion extremes, but this does not capture the true error-correction dynamics specified in the original signal.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: bb_pct_b < 0.0 approximates extreme negative divergence (long entry), bb_pct_b > 1.0 approximates extreme positive divergence (short entry). Exit conditions represent partial reversion to mean (0.5 SD equivalent). However, this translation loses the statistical rigor of cointegration testing and ECM-specific thresholds. A proper implementation requires custom cointegration and ECM indicators outside the allowed set.
